description: Letter or state document in Arabic script. Wide space between the lines. Three lines are preserved. Mentions iqṭāʿāt and the year 589 H, if read correctly. The place mentioned seems to be Mīt al-Khayr in the Gharbiyya province.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בNLI.
